purpose: Record combat implementation pass for Demoralizing Strike, Flèche, and Grazing Shot from Galaxy of Intrigue.

implementedEntries.name: Demoralizing Strike
implementedEntries.mechanic: When an Attack of Opportunity successfully deals damage, helper exposes an immediate Free Action Persuasion/Intimidate extra skill use against the damaged opponent.

implementedEntries.name: Flèche
implementedEntries.mechanic: Once per encounter when selected on a Charge, runtime exposes natural 17-20 as critical threat range for that charge attack and provides spendChargeAttackRider for encounter use tracking.

implementedEntries.name: Grazing Shot
implementedEntries.mechanic: Adds actor-aware Grazing Shot action card for actors with the feat. Runtime helper exposes two attack rolls, secondary target line-of-sight/range predicates, and one all-or-nothing split damage roll if both attacks hit.

automationBoundary.Demoralizing Strike: AoO damage workflow must call getAttackOfOpportunityDamageRiders after damage is dealt and launch the Persuasion Intimidate extra skill use as a Free Action.
automationBoundary.Flèche: Charge attack workflow must expose/select the fleche option, use the criticalThreatNaturalMin metadata during crit evaluation, and call spendChargeAttackRider after confirmed use.
automationBoundary.Grazing Shot: Special ranged attack workflow must call getSpecialRangedAttackActions, resolve both attack rolls before damage, verify secondary target LOS and 6-square distance, and apply split damage only if both attacks hit.
